---
image: img.jpg
title: Are approach-avoidance relevant cues of the Emotional User eXperience? Case
  studies with innovative products
author: Damien Dupré, Pascal Pizelle, Michel Dubois, and Anna Tcherkassof
description: Consortium of European Research on Emotion (CERE 2016)
date: '2016-03-26'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Consortium of European Research on Emotion (CERE 2016)

:::
